things.name: Christ the Redeemer
things.description: The iconic 30-metre Art Deco Christ statue atop Corcovado mountain — one of the New Seven Wonders of the World

things.name: Sugarloaf Mountain Cable Car
things.description: Twin cable car ascent to the 396-metre peak at the mouth of Guanabara Bay — sunset views are unmissable

things.name: Copacabana Beach
things.description: The world's most famous urban beach — 4 km of golden sand with beach volleyball, caipirinhas and people-watching

things.name: Ipanema Beach
things.description: Brazil's most fashionable beach — inspiration for The Girl from Ipanema, with sunset views of Dois Irmãos

things.name: Santa Teresa Neighbourhood
things.description: Bohemian hillside district with colonial houses, art studios and the famous yellow tram (bonde)

things.name: Lapa Arches & Nightlife
things.description: 18th-century Roman aqueduct that becomes Rio's most famous nightlife strip — samba clubs and street parties

things.name: Tijuca National Park
things.description: The world's largest urban forest — hiking trails to waterfalls, monkeys and views of the Christ statue

things.name: Maracanã Stadium Tour
things.description: The world's most famous football stadium — now seating 78,000 but once held 200,000 for the 1950 World Cup

things.name: Jardim Botânico
things.description: 1808 botanical garden famous for its Avenue of Royal Palms — 6,000 plant species and free-roaming monkeys

things.name: Museum of Tomorrow (Museu do Amanhã)
things.description: Stunning Santiago Calatrava science museum on a pier in the revitalised Porto Maravilha waterfront district
